metadata.name: Arjuna
metadata.primary_role: Third Pandava / Greatest archer in the world / Receiver of the Bhagavad Gita / Son of Indra
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (Kuru Dynasty, Hastinapur/Indraprastha, son of Kunti and Indra)
metadata.divine_origin: Son of Indra (King of Gods) — inherits divine martial talent, ambidexterity (Savyasachi), ability to wield all celestial weapons

timelines.context_description: At the tournament of Hastinapur, displaying his unparalleled archery skill to the court.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Gaur-shyamal (healthy dark copper or olive complexion, radiant and vibrant)
physical_appearance.height: Tall, exceptionally agile and flexible, athletic grace in every movement
physical_appearance.build: Athletic, lean muscles optimized for rapid movement, broad chest, ambidextrous calluses on both palms, the body of a supreme martial artist — built for speed, precision, and endurance rather than brute force
physical_appearance.facial_features: Sharp, intensely focused eyes like a hawk (his legendary concentration), high cheekbones, confident charismatic smile, clean-shaven or light stubble, strikingly handsome — the most conventionally attractive of the Pandavas, face radiating supreme focused confidence
physical_appearance.hair: Black hair tied tightly back into a topknot to prevent obstruction while shooting, practical warrior style
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: Noticeable symmetry in arm movements — both arms equally developed due to perfect ambidexterity (Savyasachi), palms calloused evenly on both sides, moves with a dancer's precision

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: White and silver silk practice dhotis, tight leather arm guards (Angulitrana) on both forearms, training gear that allows maximum flexibility
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Minimalist silver necklaces, simple armlets, small royal crest in hair, practical elegance — nothing that interferes with archery
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: A highly flexible composite bow, metallic quivers filled with specialized arrows, each arrow type serving a different purpose

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Confident, energetic, intensely focused, youthful charisma — the most charming and socially gifted of the Pandavas
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Tenor-baritone, clear and vibrant, carrying and precise — a voice that commands attention without overwhelming
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Quick but precise speech, highly respectful to elders, oozing supreme confidence in martial skill, speaks with the ease of natural talent, socially charming
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Eager focused concentration, competitive fire, supreme martial confidence, youthful ambition to be the best

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Cinematic 8k shot of young Prince Arjuna, age 20, in a grand arena. Dark copper olive skin, hawk-like intensely focused eyes, black hair in warrior topknot. Athletic lean build wearing silver and white silk dhoti with leather arm guards. Drawing a bow string with perfect posture, both arms perfectly developed. Dynamic arena lighting, crowd in background. 3D Pixar style, photorealistic.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A vibrant, confident young male tenor-baritone. Clear, precise, charismatic. Radiating martial focus and ambition. Age approximately 20 years.

timelines.context_description: On the battlefield of Kurukshetra after receiving the Bhagavad Gita from Krishna, transformed from doubt to divine purpose.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Darkened bronze, weathered by 13 years of exile and intense combat, radiating divine purpose after the Gita
physical_appearance.height: Imposing, battle-hardened stature, carries the weight of divine mission
physical_appearance.build: Massive shoulder strength, heavily muscular torso from years of exile training, scarred forearms, the physique of the apex warrior of the age
physical_appearance.facial_features: Deep, multi-layered expression — the doubt of Arjuna's crisis resolved into absolute divine focus, eyes wide and luminous with Krishna's teaching, battle-hardened features, expression of cosmic duty transcending personal grief
physical_appearance.hair: Long black hair with streaks of grey, partly covered by a magnificent golden helmet
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: Deep calluses, battle scars across shoulders and chest, when he draws Gandiva the earth trembles and the sky splits, his arrow-rain is described as making the sky invisible

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Golden chainmail armor (Kavacha), rich crimson and gold battle garments, divine diadem (Kiriti — gift from Indra)
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Heavy golden armlets, divine protective amulets, the ornate war crown/helmet Kiriti, divine earrings from Indra
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: The legendary celestial bow Gandiva — massive, glowing with divine energy, string vibrating with cosmic power; infinite quivers provided by Agni, Pashupatastra and other divine weapons

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Thunderous yet emotionally complex — ranges from profound despair (pre-Gita) to world-shaking determination (post-Gita)
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Deep, resonant baritone with a gravelly battle-hardened edge — matured from his youthful tenor
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Commanding, profound, echoing across the battlefield, full of weight, invokes divine weapons with ritualistic precision, his war-cry 'GANDIVA!' shakes the earth
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Post-Gita divine clarity — absolute purpose overriding personal grief, cosmic warrior fulfilling his dharmic role, the focused intensity of one who has seen the Vishvarupa (universal form of God)

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Epic battlefield shot of Arjuna at Kurukshetra, age 45. Standing on his golden chariot with Krishna as charioteer. Weathered bronze skin, golden armor with battle-wear, majestic Kiriti helmet over grey-streaked dark hair. Eyes blazing with divine focused light. Drawing the massive glowing Gandiva bow, celestial arrow blazing. Battlefield chaos, smoke, divine lights. 3D Pixar style, epic cinematic, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A deep, powerful battle-hardened baritone. Emotionally complex — from profound despair to earth-shaking determination. Cosmic warrior's voice. Age approximately 45 years.
